examples: Megavolt Ampere of transformation capacity achieved the target of 75,000 MVA.
Megavolt Ampere (MVA) of transformation capacity against a target of 75,000 MVA.
Each unit should include a main switch and ammeter with a scale of about 20 ampere capacity.
This allows Ampere to iterate quickly, exploring niches to see what works.
It will take Ampere only a matter of months to find out.
